issues.sample: FROM TIME TO TIME, AFTER THE AUTO ENGINE SHUTOFF ENGAGES, WHEN I RELEASE THE BRAKE AND THE ENGINE RESTARTS, POWER STEERING ISN'T AVAILABLE FOR ROUGHLY 5 SECONDS (THE CAR IS UN-STEERABLE).  THIS HAPPENS WHEN THE CAR IS AT A COMPLETE STOP, AND I'M ATTEMPTING TO START MOVING AGAIN.

narrative.headline: What 2019 Audi Q7 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 61 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (16% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
